name: ad_get_model_plot
description: Get model bounds (upper/lower/median) to explain why something was or was not flagged as anomalous. Shows the model's confidence interval at each time point. If actual value is within bounds, no anomaly; if outside, anomaly score depends on distance from bounds.

configuration.query: FROM .ml-anomalies-* | WHERE result_type == "model_plot" AND job_id == ?job_id AND timestamp >= ?start_time AND timestamp <= ?end_time | SORT timestamp ASC | KEEP job_id, timestamp, model_lower, model_upper, model_median, actual, partition_field_value, by_field_value | LIMIT 500

start_time.description: Start of time range in ISO 8601 format

end_time.description: End of time range in ISO 8601 format
